since_last: 34% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.82%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.25% · BTC -2.01% · Gold -2.40% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 34% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.82%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.82%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.04%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -14.10%
cards.body: Leaders: CBRS +9.31%, SKHY +5.01%, HON +4.73%, GEV +4.39%, SMCI +4.13%. Laggards: TSLA -14.10%, CRNC -8.00%, GOOGL -6.65%, SYM -4.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.31% at $115.62
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.31% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
